title: Office Plant Care Volunteer Signup
title_zh: 辦公室植物照護志工招募

all.en: Subject: Calling All Green Thumbs — Plant Care Volunteers Needed
all.zh: 主旨：徵求綠手指志工協助照顧辦公室植栽

all.en: Hello everyone,
all.zh: 嗨，各位同仁，

all.en: Our office is now home to over forty indoor plants.
all.zh: 我們辦公室目前共有超過四十盆室內植栽。

all.en: These plants improve air quality and brighten the workspace.
all.zh: 這些植栽能淨化空氣並美化辦公環境。

all.en: However, they require consistent watering and gentle care.
all.zh: 然而，它們需要規律的澆水與細心照料。

all.en: We are launching a volunteer rotation to share this responsibility.
all.zh: 我們將推動志工輪值制度，共同分擔照顧責任。

all.en: The General Affairs team is currently seeking willing helpers.
all.zh: 總務部目前正在徵求願意協助的志工。

all.en: No prior gardening experience is required to join.
all.zh: 報名不需具備園藝經驗。

all.en: We will provide a short training session for all volunteers.
all.zh: 我們將為所有志工提供簡短的培訓課程。

all.en: Training covers watering schedules, sunlight needs, and pest signs.
all.zh: 培訓內容包含澆水時程、光照需求與病蟲害辨識。

all.en: Each volunteer will be assigned a small zone within the office.
all.zh: 每位志工將分配辦公室內的一個小區域負責。

all.en: Zones contain between four and six plants on average.
all.zh: 每區平均包含四到六盆植栽。

all.en: The recommended commitment is about ten minutes per week.
all.zh: 建議的投入時間約為每週十分鐘。

all.en: You may choose any day that fits your schedule.
all.zh: 您可選擇任何符合自身行程的日期執行。

all.en: Watering cans, gloves, and fertilizer will be provided.
all.zh: 澆水壺、手套與肥料皆由公司提供。

all.en: Supplies are stored in the cabinet near the back kitchen.
all.zh: 用品收納於後方茶水間附近的櫃子中。

all.en: A care guide will be posted next to each plant cluster.
all.zh: 每組植栽旁將張貼照顧指南。

all.en: The guide shows the plant name and watering frequency.
all.zh: 指南內容包含植物名稱與澆水頻率。

all.en: Most plants only need watering once or twice per week.
all.zh: 多數植栽僅需每週澆水一到兩次。

all.en: Overwatering is actually the most common care mistake.
all.zh: 過度澆水其實是最常見的照顧錯誤。

all.en: Please check soil moisture before adding more water.
all.zh: 澆水前請先檢查土壤濕度。

all.en: Yellow leaves often signal too much water, not too little.
all.zh: 葉片發黃通常代表水分過多而非不足。

all.en: If you notice any problems, please report them on the shared sheet.
all.zh: 若發現任何問題，請於共用表單回報。

all.en: Our office gardener will visit monthly to assess overall health.
all.zh: 公司園藝師將每月到訪評估整體植栽狀況。

all.en: She will also handle repotting and major pruning tasks.
all.zh: 她也會負責換盆與大型修剪作業。

all.en: Volunteers do not need to worry about complex maintenance.
all.zh: 志工無需擔心複雜的養護工作。

all.en: Your role is simply to keep our plants happy day-to-day.
all.zh: 您的角色只是確保植栽日常狀態良好。

all.en: We are aiming to recruit at least eight volunteers in total.
all.zh: 我們目標總共招募至少八位志工。

all.en: Rotations will last for three months at a time.
all.zh: 每次輪值期間為三個月。

all.en: After your term, you may renew or step down freely.
all.zh: 輪值結束後可自由續任或退出。

all.en: A new sign-up window opens before each rotation begins.
all.zh: 每次輪值前皆會開放新的報名期。

all.en: To thank our volunteers, we will host quarterly appreciation lunches.
all.zh: 為感謝志工，我們將舉辦每季感謝午餐會。

all.en: Each volunteer also receives a small succulent to take home.
all.zh: 每位志工亦可獲得一盆小型多肉植物帶回家。

all.en: Photos of our happiest plants will be featured in the newsletter.
all.zh: 狀態最佳的植栽照片將刊登於公司電子報。

all.en: We will tag volunteers as our official Plant Heroes.
all.zh: 我們會將志工標註為官方的植栽英雄。

all.en: This initiative supports our broader green office mission.
all.zh: 本計畫呼應公司更廣泛的綠色辦公室目標。

all.en: Plants reduce stress and increase workplace satisfaction.
all.zh: 植栽能降低壓力並提升工作滿意度。

all.en: Studies show even small greenery can improve focus.
all.zh: 研究顯示，少量綠意亦能提升專注力。

all.en: We hope this program builds connection across departments.
all.zh: 我們希望本方案能促進跨部門連結。

all.en: Volunteers from different teams often bond during care rounds.
all.zh: 不同部門的志工常於照顧時間建立友誼。

all.en: If you have plant ideas or favorites, please let us know.
all.zh: 若您有植栽建議或喜愛品項，歡迎告知。

all.en: We are considering adding herbs to the pantry area.
all.zh: 我們正考慮於茶水間增加香草植物。

all.en: Fresh basil and mint could be available for everyone to enjoy.
all.zh: 新鮮羅勒與薄荷可供全員使用。

all.en: To sign up, please complete the form linked below.
all.zh: 如欲報名，請填寫下方連結之表單。

all.en: The deadline for this round is Friday, June 13th.
all.zh: 本輪報名截止日為 6 月 13 日星期五。

all.en: Training will be held on the following Monday at 4 p.m.
all.zh: 培訓將於隔週一下午四點舉行。

all.en: Snacks and drinks will be provided during training.
all.zh: 培訓期間提供點心與飲料。

all.en: If you cannot attend the live session, recordings will be shared.
all.zh: 若無法參加現場培訓，可觀看錄影檔。

all.en: Questions can be sent directly to the General Affairs office.
all.zh: 如有問題可直接寄信至總務辦公室。

all.en: We truly appreciate your willingness to help.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝您願意伸出援手。

all.en: Even small efforts make a big difference for our shared space.
all.zh: 再小的付出對共享空間都意義重大。

all.en: Let's keep our office a vibrant and welcoming place.
all.zh: 讓我們一同維持辦公室的活力與溫度。

all.en: Thank you for being part of our green family.
all.zh: 感謝您加入我們的綠意家族。

all.en: Best wishes,
all.zh: 誠摯祝福，

all.en: General Affairs Department
all.zh: 總務部 敬上
